name: okta_admin_disabled_mfa
description: Org/account-wide MFA disabled by an admin (UDM ADMIN_MFA_DISABLED, which the Okta data model maps to eventType system.mfa.factor.deactivate).

validation.notes: Fully portable; all required fields exist (eventType, actor, source_ip). Zero system.mfa.factor.deactivate events in 90d. Rare and high-severity (org-wide MFA disable) - exactly the kind of detection worth pre-staging. Distinct from user.mfa.factor.deactivate (user-initiated, 53 events) which powers okta_user_mfa_reset.
